package rulefixtures

import (
	"crypto/tls"
)

// scenario for hardcoded_tls_min_version_too_low: `tls.Config{MinVersion: tls.VersionTLS10}` or `tls.VersionTLS11` or `tls.VersionSSL30`
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario715Positive() *tls.Config {
	return &tls.Config{InsecureSkipVerify: true, MinVersion: tls.VersionTLS10}
}
